frictions.description: Clerk auth in headless browser did not complete signup in-session; submit remained stuck in Loading after valid email/password entry, preventing access to authenticated pantry UI.
frictions.resolution: Retried by waiting an additional 15 seconds in the same dedicated session and captured post-submit/diagnostic evidence; issue persisted.

blockers.description: Could not establish authenticated session required for pantry management assertions.
blockers.details: Observed /pantry -> /sign-in redirect; sign-up submit remained Loading; console included Private Access Token challenge message and 401; current URL remained on sign-up route.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Retried sign-up flow once in the same dedicated session, waited 12s after submit plus an additional 15s, and captured console/errors/network/header diagnostics; blocker persisted.

summary: Tested VAL-PAN-001 through VAL-PAN-012: 0 passed, 0 failed, 12 blocked by external Clerk auth challenge preventing authenticated pantry access in this isolated session.
